final:
// // This module implements a Serial-In, Parallel-Out (SIPO) shift register that captures a serial input bitstream and converts it into a 4-bit parallel output. The register updates its 4-bit buffer on each falling edge of the clock, shifting out the most recent serial input bit while keeping the oldest bit in the buffer. The buffer resets to zero when the reset signal is high. The resulting 4-bit wide output can then be used for further processing or interfacing with parallel data paths.
module top_module(
    input wire clk,    // clock input
    input wire rst,    // reset input
    input wire SerialIn,   // serial input
    output wire [3:0] BusOut   // parallel output
);reg [3:0] SIPO_Buffer = 0;   // 4-bit buffer

always @(posedge clk, negedge rst) begin
    if (!rst) begin
        SIPO_Buffer <= 0;   // clear buffer on reset
    end
    else begin
        SIPO_Buffer <= {SIPO_Buffer[2:0], SerialIn};   // shift data into buffer
    end
end

assign BusOut = SIPO_Buffer;   // output buffer on parallel bus

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a Serial-In, Parallel-Out (SIPO) shift register that captures a serial input bitstream and converts it into a 4-bit parallel output. The register updates its 4-bit buffer on each falling edge of the clock, shifting out the most recent serial input bit while keeping the oldest bit in the buffer. The buffer resets to zero when the reset signal is high. The resulting 4-bit wide output can then be used for further processing or interfacing with parallel data paths.
